name: How much is a lawsuit worth if AI legal advice botched my Houston settlement?
description: Lost settlement value + costs; consult for valuation.[1]

mainEntity.name: How much is a lawsuit worth if AI legal advice botched my Houston settlement?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lost settlement value + costs; consult for valuation.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Depends on lost recovery amount, plus fees/costs; e.g., $50K under-settlement could yield $100K+ claim.[1] Malpractice caps apply.[1] Key factors: provable negligence; comparative fault; expert valuation.[1] Calculate differential settlement value; document AI reliance; assess jurisdiction caps.[1] Lawyer estimates via comps.
